equipment.description: Standard API 610 overhung pump for process fluids.
Reciprocating or rotary pump for high viscosity fluids.
Air-operated or motor-driven diaphragm pump for corrosive or abrasive fluids.
Rotary positive displacement pump for metering.
Pump for handling slurries and shear-sensitive fluids.
Dynamic compressor for large volume gas processing.
Positive displacement compressor for high pressure applications.
Rotary compressor for refrigeration and plant air.
Low pressure gas mover for aeration or ventilation.
Top-entry mixer for continuous or batch reaction vessels.
Inline mixing device with no moving parts.
Vessel with agitator used for continuous chemical reactions.
Tubular reactor where fluid flows as a series of plugs.
Closed vessel where reactants are added, react, and products are removed.
Reactor where solid particles are suspended in an upward flowing gas/liquid.
Tubular reactor filled with solid catalyst particles.
Common heat exchanger design with a bundle of tubes inside a cylindrical shell.
Compact heat exchanger using corrugated metal plates.
Heat exchanger using ambient air forced over finned tubes by a fan.
Simple heat exchanger consisting of one pipe inside another.
Heat rejection device that extracts waste heat to the atmosphere.
Machine that removes heat from a liquid via a vapor-compression or absorption cycle.
Industrial furnace used to heat process fluids to high temperatures.
Closed vessel in which water or other fluid is heated to generate steam.
Linear motion valve used to start or stop fluid flow.
Linear motion valve used for regulating flow.
Quarter-turn valve using a hollow, pivoting ball to control flow.
Quarter-turn valve with a disc that rotates to allow or block flow.
Valve that allows fluid to flow in only one direction.
Valve used to control fluid flow by varying the size of the flow passage as directed by a signal.
Safety valve designed to relieve pressure to prevent overpressurization.
Container that holds liquids, compressed gases or mediums used for the short- or long-term storage of heat or cold.
Container designed to hold gases or liquids at a pressure substantially different from the ambient pressure.
Vertical vessel used to separate mixtures into their component parts based on differences in boiling points.
Vessel where a gas mixture is contacted with a liquid to selectively dissolve one or more components.
Vessel used to transfer a solute from one liquid phase to another immiscible liquid phase.
Batch operation, fixed volume piece of equipment ranging from 0.1m3 -20m3 that separates liquids and solids using pressure filtration.
Equipment driven by a motor that spins liquid samples at high speed.
Device that separates solid particles or liquid droplets from a gas stream using centrifugal force.
Air pollution control device that removes particulates out of air or gas released from commercial processes.
Device used to measure the flow rate of a fluid.
Device used to determine the level of a fluid or bulk solid in a vessel.
Device used to measure the pressure of a fluid.
Device that connects to a temperature sensor to transmit the signal for monitoring and control.
Device used to measure chemical properties like pH, conductivity, or specific gas concentrations.
Machine that converts electrical energy into mechanical energy.
Type of motor controller that drives an electric motor by varying the frequency and voltage supplied to the electric motor.
Combination of electrical disconnect switches, fuses or circuit breakers used to control, protect and isolate electrical equipment.
Passive component that transfers electrical energy from one electrical circuit to another circuit.
Assembly to control some or all electric motors in a central location.
